extraction.description: Agreement by Owner to pay CBRE Raleigh a leasing commission for the 10-year Michaels lease extension at Knightdale Marketplace East, with a portion co-paid to The Providence Group as cooperating broker.
extraction.term_summary: Agreement effective upon execution; covers commission for the 10-year Michaels Extension per Second Amendment to Shopping Lease dated 2023-03-22; no separate expiration stated for this commission agreement itself.
extraction.commission_summary: Commission = 4% of aggregate base rent over the initial 10-year Michaels Extension term, stipulated at $94,798.00 total; 2% ($47,399.00) of that is paid over to The Providence Group as Cooperating Broker; payable to Listing Broker within 30 days of Owner's receipt of invoice.
extraction.notes: Owner is BBK Midway Plantation LLC (via BBK Knightdale, LLC / M&J Knightdale Investors LLC / M&J Knightdale Manager Inc.), Marc R. Wilkow signing. Property: Knightdale Marketplace East, Knightdale, NC. Owner cannot reduce commission without Listing Broker's written consent; prevailing party in litigation recovers attorneys' fees.

NC governing law; 5-business-day notice of legal actions; prevailing party attorney's fees.

title: Exclsv Leasing AGR-CBRE Raleight (7-19-19).pdf
file_path: V:\Knightdale Marketplace 7-15-19\KM-East (fka Shoppes at Midway)\OPERATIONS\Brokerage & Leasing Agreements\2019\Exclsv Leasing AGR-CBRE Raleight (7-19-19).pdf

extraction.description: Exclusive leasing agreement appointing CBRE|Raleigh as sole listing broker for new leases at Midtown Commons and Shoppes at Midway Plantation in Knightdale, NC, owned by BBK Knightdale, LLC.
extraction.term_summary: Initial 1-year term from Effective Date; after 90 days either party may terminate with 30 days notice; if not terminated 30 days before expiration, auto-renews for successive 12-month periods, terminable anytime thereafter on 30 days notice.
extraction.commission_summary: New leases (non-outparcel): 4% of net minimum rent up to 10-yr term (6% if co-broker involved). Outparcel/Pad Site leases: 4% years 1-10, 2% years 11-20 (6%/4% with co-broker). Ross Dress for Less relocation: 4% on extension period. Paid 50% at lease execution/contingency removal, 50% at tenant opening/rent commencement. Pad/Outparcel sales: lesser of 6% of sales price or $85,000. Protected List tail: 150 days post-termination for prospects on Broker's submitted list.
extraction.notes: Designated Representative: Reagan Crabtree; owner is BBK Knightdale, LLC (c/o M&J Wilkow Properties). Broker responsible for 2 in-ground signs. OFAC compliance procedures required. Protected List of prospects due within 10 days of expiration/termination; 150-day tail for commission if such prospect signs lease. Sale/exchange/purchase of pad sites also commissionable if consummated during term or within 180 days after.

extraction.amends: Exclusive Leasing Agreement between ML-MJW Port Chester SC Owner LLC (Owner) and CBRE, Inc., dated February 25, 2019, as amended and/or extended, for Port Chester Shopping Center (Gateway), 421 Boston Post Rd., Port Chester, NY
extraction.commission_summary: No new commission rates set; confirms Owner will pay CBRE commission(s) per Section 6(d) of the original 2019 Exclusive Leasing Agreement if a lease is consummated with any tenant on the attached Protected Tenant list (Exhibit A) within the post-term protection window specified in that Section. Full/2nd-half commission amounts referenced for Shake Shack, ReStore and V Nail Bar per original agreement terms.
extraction.description: Post-term letter confirming expiration of CBRE's exclusive leasing agreement for Port Chester Shopping Center and listing protected prospective tenants (Exhibit A) for which CBRE retains commission rights if deals close.
extraction.notes: Underlying Exclusive Leasing Agreement (Feb 25, 2019) expired 2024-04-15. This letter/Exhibit A establishes the Section 6(d) Protected Tenant tail list. Extensive email dispute (Apr 23-30, 2024, Ken Stern/CBRE vs Peter Skontos & David Eisen/Wilkow) over which prospects qualify as 'active' negotiations; final agreed protected list after negotiation: Shake Shack, ReStore, V(N) Nail Bar (commissions owed), plus Vital Stretch, Crunch Fitness, Dave's Hot Chicken (acknowledged prospects); Tatte Bakery, Barnes & Noble, Dos Toros, Hand & Stone, Yoga 6 disputed/crossed out per Owner's position that no active LOI negotiations existed at expiration. Owner entity: ML-MJW Port Chester SC Owner LLC (MetLife/M&J Wilkow venture); Marc R. Wilkow signed for Owner. Owner to notify CBRE upon turnover completion for Shake Shack, ReStore, V Nail Bar.
extraction.term_summary: Confirms prior Exclusive Leasing Agreement (as amended/extended) expired 2024-04-15; this letter establishes a post-term protected-tenant tail period per Section 6(d) for prospects on Exhibit A.

No commission on renewals, expansions, ROFR/ROFO exercises (except limited extension-option carve-out for <10-yr initial terms).
extraction.description: Exclusive leasing brokerage agreement appointing RIPCO as sole/exclusive leasing broker for new tenant leases at Port Chester (Gateway) Shopping Center, NY, excluding renewals, subleases, and certain named protected tenants/office uses.
extraction.notes: Owner: ML-MJW Port Chester SC Owner LLC (MetLife/M&J Wilkow venture). Excludes extensions, subleases, assignments, restructures, holdovers, storage/month-to-month, office leasing in former PetSmart/Modell's building, and CBRE Protected List tenants (Shake Shack, ReStore, V Nail Bar, Vital Stretch, Dave's Hot Chicken, Crunch Fitness). Post-termination protected-prospect tail: Commission due if lease with a listed Protected Prospect executes within 120 days after expiration/termination (list due within 5 business days of termination, unless terminated for cause). Owner liability capped at $10M against equity interest in Property only. Project Team: Jeffrey Howard & Brian Ripka; Owner contacts Tim Shields/Peter Skontos for written requests on excluded transactions.

extraction.description: Exclusive leasing agreement appointing CBRE as exclusive leasing agent for Port Chester Shopping Center, Port Chester, NY, owned by ML-MJW Port Chester SC Owner LLC (MetLife/M&J Wilkow affiliate).
extraction.term_summary: Initial term of one (1) year from execution date; Owner may terminate for any reason on 30 days' notice, Contractor on 60 days' notice; either party may terminate on 7 days' notice for uncured material default; automatic termination upon sale/transfer of Project to unaffiliated party. No stated auto-renewal.
extraction.commission_summary: New Leases: 6% of Minimum Rental years 1-10, 3% years 11-15, 2% years 16-20. Renewals/extensions: 1/2 of applicable New Lease commission. Expansion terms treated as New Lease. Outside/co-brokers capped at 1/2 of CBRE's commission (inclusive, not additive). Payment: 50% within 30 days of lease execution (or waiver of tenant pre-commencement termination right), 50% within 30 days after tenant occupancy/rent commencement (or 100% within 30 days of execution for renewal documents, subject to tenant termination right proration).
extraction.notes: Owner: ML-MJW Port Chester SC Owner LLC (Delaware LLC, MetLife Real Estate / M&J Wilkow Properties). Excluded Transactions (no commission unless Owner makes written request for Side Agreement): exercise of pre-negotiated renewal/extension options, most relocations, subleases, assignments, restructures, storage/pop-up/month-to-month leases, holdover rents. Protected Tenant tail: 270 days post-termination/expiration (extendable 30 days if LOI executed at end of 270-day period) for tenants on an approved Protected List. Project Team point person: Jessica Curtis, SVP; no Competing Properties listed (Exhibit C = None). Liability of Owner capped at $10MM against equity interest in Project only. Governing law: state where Project located (NY), but venue/jurisdiction consent to PA state/federal courts per Section 30 (as drafted, appears to be a form inconsistency).

title: Exclsv Leasing AGR-TSCG (11-5-16).pdf

extraction.description: Owner Magnolia Park Greenville, LLC appoints TSCG as exclusive leasing agent for new-tenant leasing at Magnolia Park, 1025 Woodruff Road, Greenville, SC.
extraction.term_summary: 1-year initial term from 11/5/2016; Owner may terminate anytime on 30 days' notice, Contractor on 90 days' notice; either party may terminate on 7 days' notice for uncured material default; auto-terminates on sale/transfer of Project to unrelated party; no automatic renewal stated.
extraction.commission_summary: New leases only (excludes renewals/expansions/subleases): 4% of Net Base Rental over Primary Term (up to 10 yrs) if no outside broker; if outside broker involved, TSCG commission = 3% (Independent Contractor's fixed share) with total commission up to 6% (150% of 4%), TSCG pays outside broker from its share. 50% of commission paid within 30 days of lease execution; remaining 50% paid within 30 days after tenant occupies, commences rent-paying occupancy (unless free rent exceeds 2 months). No commission for renewals, expansions, holdover rent, termination/buyout fees, or on cancelable/reducible lease portions unless tenant pays unamortized commission.
extraction.notes: Excludes Excluded Tenant on Schedule 2 (commission may instead be due to former broker Collett Associates, LLC). Protected-tenant tail: TSCG entitled to commission if New Lease executed within 120 days (extendable up to 30 more days if negotiations ongoing) after expiration/termination with tenant on an approved pre-termination list. Owner liability capped at $1,000,000 against its equity interest only. Project Team named: Dawn Prince Hoover, Molly Prince, Llauren Perdue, Alex Munoz. Competing Properties allowed: Woodruff Shopping Center, Verdae Village. Extensive OFAC/FCPA/REIT compliance, insurance ($6M GL, $1M WC/EL, $2.5M crime, $1M auto, $5M E&O), and confidentiality/Personal Information Safeguard obligations apply.

extraction.term_summary: Initial 1-year term from execution date; automatically renews year-to-year thereafter unless terminated per Section 7(b) (owner: 30 days notice; contractor: 90 days notice; 7 days for material default; auto-terminates on sale/transfer of Project to unaffiliated party).
extraction.commission_summary: New leases only (not renewals/expansions/subleases/assignments): 4% of Net Base Rental over Primary Term (up to 10 yrs) if no outside broker; if outside broker involved, total commission up to 6% (150% of 4%), split with Independent Contractor receiving up to 3% (max half) and remainder to Outside Broker. 50% commission paid within 30 days of lease execution; remaining 50% within 30 days after tenant unconditionally accepts space, is in occupancy, and pays initial rent installment.
extraction.notes: Owner: Magnolia Park Greenville, LLC (Delaware LLC, c/o M&J Wilkow Properties/MetLife). No commission for holdover tenancy, lease termination fees/buyouts, or tenant option to expand/extend unless Owner requests assistance (fee then mutually negotiated). Liability capped at $2,000,000 against Owner's equity in Project. Project Team must include Cortney Carter, Bill Runge, Greg Carter. Contractor barred from serving as agent for competing properties (Haywood Mall, Shops at Greenridge) without consent.

extraction.description: Commission agreement for Collett Management to procure a lease with Kirkland's Stores at Magnolia Park, Greenville SC (Suite #G102, ~7,424 SF).
extraction.term_summary: Agreement void if lease with Kirkland's is not executed within 12 months of agreement date (i.e., by 2017-10-28); no stated ongoing term otherwise.
extraction.commission_summary: Commission = 3% of total base rent for primary lease term; 50% due/payable at lease execution and waiver of all lease contingencies, 50% at tenant's opening for business and payment of first month's rent. No commission owed for renewals/expansions. If other brokers (e.g. Core Properties, Inc.) claim a fee, brokers resolve disputes among themselves.
extraction.notes: Landlord entity: Magnolia Park Greenville LLC (managed by M&J Wilkow Properties, LLC). Broker indemnifies Landlord against competing commission claims. Agreement becomes null/void if lease not signed within 12 months. If property is sold/transferred, agreement binds successors; Landlord may require assumption by new owner to be released.

title: AGR-Colliers International SC-Wild Wing Cafe (11-15-16).pdf
file_path: V:\Magnolia Park 11-20-14\OPERATIONS\Commission Agreements\2016\AGR-Colliers International SC-Wild Wing Cafe (11-15-16).pdf

extraction.description: Commission agreement for Colliers, procuring agent representing Wild Wing Cafe, to lease 7,255 SF at Magnolia Park, Greenville SC.
extraction.commission_summary: Owner pays Broker 3.00% of Minimum Rent for the initial lease term; paid one-half 30 days after lease execution and waiver of contingencies, and one-half 30 days after Tenant's initial payment of Minimum Rent.
extraction.term_summary: No stated term; commission triggered upon full execution of lease between Owner and Tenant.
extraction.notes: Broker represents Tenant, not Owner, in this transaction; Broker indemnifies Owner against other commission claims. Broker waives/releases any lien rights upon receipt of commission and must execute waiver documents within 5 days of Owner's request. Owner entity: Magnolia Park Greenville LLC (Marc R. Wilkow, President of manager entity, signed 11-15-16).

title: Disclosure & Fee AGR-Core Prop-Kirklands (10-28-16).pdf
file_path: V:\Magnolia Park 11-20-14\OPERATIONS\Commission Agreements\2016\Disclosure & Fee AGR-Core Prop-Kirklands (10-28-16).pdf

extraction.description: Disclosure and Fee Agreement in which Landlord agrees to pay Core Properties a commission if Kirkland's leases space at Magnolia Park before October 31, 2017.
extraction.term_summary: Deal-specific window: commission earned only if a lease with Kirkland's is executed at the Property before October 31, 2017; no renewal mechanism stated.
extraction.commission_summary: New lease: 3.00% of base rent over initial term; 50% paid at lease execution, 50% paid when tenant opens for business/pays first month's rent and contingencies satisfied. No renewal/expansion commission specified (N/A). Sale protection: N/A.
extraction.notes: Core acts as agent of the Tenant (Kirkland's), not the Landlord. Landlord entity: Magnolia Park Greenville, LLC, signed by Marc R. Wilkow, President of Property Manager. Property: retail development near I-85, Greenville, SC (Magnolia Park). Sale protection provision references N/A commission rate if Property sold to Tenant during term.

title: LTR AGR-Commission AGR Side LTR-Kirklands (2-2-17).pdf
file_path: V:\Magnolia Park 11-20-14\OPERATIONS\Commission Agreements\2017\LTR AGR-Commission AGR Side LTR-Kirklands (2-2-17).pdf

extraction.description: Side letter suspending commission payment obligation to Core Properties on the Kirkland's lease at Magnolia Park Shopping Center until Kirkland's lease termination rights lapse or are waived.
extraction.amends: Unspecified prior brokerage/commission agreement(s) between Owner and Core Properties covering the Kirkland's Lease Transaction at Magnolia Park Shopping Center
extraction.commission_summary: No new commission rate established; existing Broker Agreement commission terms remain in effect but payment is deferred/withheld until Kirkland's Lease termination rights (failure to deliver premises, co-tenancy failure, or failure to obtain construction permit) are no longer exercisable or are waived.
extraction.term_summary: No fixed term; suspension of commission payment remains in effect until Termination Rights expire or are waived by Kirkland's; binding on parties' successors and assigns.
extraction.notes: Owner is Magnolia Park Greenville, LLC (M & J Wilkow Properties, LLC is property manager). Confirms Owner unaware of any Co-Tenancy Failure and that contractor has submitted permit application for 'Electric Work'. Acknowledged/agreed by Core Properties (signed by James J. Duncan, undated title 'BIC').

title: AGR-Retail Specialists-Music & Arts (12-18-18).pdf
file_path: V:\Magnolia Park 11-20-14\OPERATIONS\Commission Agreements\2018\AGR-Retail Specialists-Music & Arts (12-18-18).pdf

extraction.description: Broker registration and commission agreement registering Retail Specialists as Music & Arts' broker for a lease at Magnolia Park Shopping Center, Greenville SC.
extraction.term_summary: Registration effective 180 days from agreement date; may extend one additional 180-day period if Prospect is in continuous negotiation; thereafter only extendable by written agreement.
extraction.commission_summary: Commission = 3.5% of net base rent over primary term (max 10 years), excluding free rent, deposits, escalations (except contractual annual increases), % rent, expense pass-throughs, allowances, and leasehold improvement amortization. Paid 50% within 30 days of lease execution/conditions satisfied plus receipt of security deposit/prepaid rent and invoice; remaining 50% within 30 days of tenant unconditional acceptance, occupancy/opening, and rent commencement (unless free rent exceeds 2 months). No commission on renewals, relocations, expansions after initial lease, or if Owner/Prospect fail to execute lease.
extraction.notes: Owner is Magnolia Park Greenville, LLC (c/o M&J Wilkow Properties). TSCG (The Shopping Center Group) is Owner's exclusive leasing broker under a separate Exclusive Leasing Agreement dated 11/5/2016 (as amended); OFAC compliance check to be performed by TSCG. Late commission payments (>90 days) accrue interest at 1.5%/month. Broker must comply with FCPA and audit/expense reimbursement restrictions.

title: AGR-Trilogy-SCG-Urban Air (2-28-19).pdf
file_path: V:\Magnolia Park 11-20-14\OPERATIONS\Commission Agreements\2019\AGR-Trilogy-SCG-Urban Air (2-28-19).pdf

extraction.description: Side letter confirming aggregate commission Landlord will pay Landlord Broker (TSCG), covering both TSCG and Tenant Broker (Trilogy Group) fees, for the Urban Air Adventure Park lease at Magnolia Park Greenville.
extraction.amends: Exclusive Leasing Agreement dated November 5, 2016 between Magnolia Park Greenville, LLC and The Shopping Center Group, LLC; also references Broker Registration and Commission Agreement dated on or about February 27, 2019 between The Trilogy Group, LLC and TSCG
extraction.commission_summary: In lieu of Subsection 4(b) commissions: Landlord pays TSCG 3% of Net Minimum Rental over Primary Term of New Lease, plus $3.00/SF of leased area (~58,907 SF); the $3.00/SF portion is passed through by TSCG to Tenant Broker (Trilogy Group). Paid in 2 installments per Section 6(b) of Broker Agreement.
extraction.notes: First installment contingent on satisfaction/waiver of any lease conditions that would otherwise allow Landlord or Tenant to terminate prior to opening for business. Landlord entity: Magnolia Park Greenville, LLC (via Magnolia Park Greenville Venture, LLC / M&J Magnolia Investors / M&J Magnolia Manager, Inc.). Confirms/modifies commission economics only; does not change term of underlying Exclusive Leasing Agreement.

title: Lien Waiver Commission-Golf Galaxy (12-9-20).pdf
file_path: V:\Magnolia Park 11-20-14\OPERATIONS\Commission Agreements\2020\Lien Waiver Commission-Golf Galaxy (12-9-20).pdf

extraction.description: Lien waiver by leasing broker acknowledging full payment of $43,234 commission for leasing Golf Galaxy space at Magnolia Park, Greenville, SC.
extraction.term_summary: Not applicable; document is a one-time lien waiver, not a term-based agreement.
extraction.commission_summary: Commission of $43,234 paid in full to Leasing Broker (The Navigator Group) for leasing the Golf Galaxy space; waiver confirms any cooperating broker has also been compensated.
extraction.notes: Broker (Tim Brennan/Navigator Group) waives all lien rights against Owner (Magnolia Park Greenville, LLC) and Property upon receipt of commission; confirms no unpaid expenses or unpaid cooperating brokers; indemnifies Owner against related claims. Property: Magnolia Park, 1025 Woodruff Road, Greenville, SC.
